{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 西寒多神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishikanta Shrine'''|西寒多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].
